title: Verifiable Action Record (VAR) Schema
description: Schema for the Sovereign Proxy Evidence Link (VAR) binding foreign reasoning to local execution.

agentId.description: Unique identifier for the agent instance.

traceId.description: Correlation ID for the entire mutation lifecycle (IGP trace).

foreignModel.description: The high-parameter foreign model used for reasoning (e.g., gpt-5-preview).

rawJustification.description: The unredacted natural language justification from the reasoner.

abstractedPayload.description: The masked/anonymized intent sent to the foreign reasoner.

policyVersion.description: The version of the National Security Policy (NSP) applied.

telemetrySnapshotHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the local system state at evaluation time.

decision.description: The final decision from the Sovereign Evaluator.

realResource.description: The unmasked local resource identifier (e.g., dc-riyadh-cooling-04).

actualCommand.description: The physical command executed on the local asset.

prevLinkHash.description: Cipher-linked hash to the previous record.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature signed by the Sovereign Proxy Kedge.
